purpose: Define the beta output-type vocabulary for libRandomizer's language-agnostic random data roadmap.

statusLegend.planned-beta: Cemented in beta documentation as a target output type.
statusLegend.in-progress: Implementation is underway but not release-gated.
statusLegend.implemented-python: Python SDK and CLI pass shared conformance for this type.
statusLegend.implemented-all: All 15 target SDKs pass shared conformance for this type.
statusLegend.deprecated: Retained only for compatibility and not recommended.
statusLegend.available-v1: Compatibility status from early v1 docs; new entries should use implemented-python or implemented-all.

types.name: Range
types.description: Range with lower and upper bounds.

returns.description: Range with lower and upper bounds.

errors: Invalid range: min must be less than or equal to max
Invalid option: unsupported format, locale, corpus, or shape for this output type

sharedOptions.min: Inclusive lower bound where the output type supports ranges.
sharedOptions.max: Inclusive upper bound where the output type supports ranges.
sharedOptions.length: Number of characters or bytes to generate.
sharedOptions.locale: Locale hint for dataset-backed values; default is en-US until broader locale support lands.
sharedOptions.allowAdult: Explicit opt-in for adult/profane corpus values; default is false.
sharedOptions.format: Return format selector for types with multiple common representations.
sharedOptions.items: Collection of values to select from.
